summary: The diff modifies frontend/src/pages/dashboard/internal.tsx to implement the requested features. The file is truncated at 4000 chars, so full verification is limited. Based on available evidence: REQ-1 appears partially implemented with Partner role mock data structure present. REQ-2, REQ-3, REQ-4 cannot be fully verified due to truncation. The project_state.json and frontend-file-summaries.txt show updated state tracking but no new component files were added.

missing_requirements.requirement: Delegation modal must have all five input fields: Partner (id/principalId/nama/skill), Jam Efektif, Unit Layanan Terpakai, Link GDrive Internal, Link GDrive Client, and Batal/Delegasikan buttons.
missing_requirements.reason: The file is truncated at 4000 chars and the AsistenmuDashboardSection implementation including the delegation modal cannot be confirmed present in the visible portion of the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Tiket section with filter and Resolve button for unresolved tickets, and History section with filter input, both using local mock state.
missing_requirements.reason: Due to truncation of internal.tsx, the Tiket and History collapsible sections for the Asistenmu role cannot be confirmed in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: When the logged-in role is Superadmin, all dashboard sections are rendered simultaneously with no restrictions.
missing_requirements.reason: Due to truncation of internal.tsx, the conditional rendering logic for Superadmin cannot be verified from the available diff content.
